channel.title: Agent Optimizer on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agent Optimizer on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: What’s New in Microsoft Foundry | June 2026
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry’s June 2026 update adds Claude GA and several agent-related features released between Build 2026 and the end of June. It also calls out autopilot agents, expanded Toolboxes and Routines, and Agent Optimizer entering private preview.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
